---
title: "Mintel Reports"
page-layout: article
---

# Mintel Reports

**Provider:** Mintel

## Description

Consumer market research platform with reports on U.S. and global markets, consumer attitudes, segmentation, and purchasing behavior. Supports marketing and consumer research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb902)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
